label: ordered pair
gloss: pair(x, y) : Pair(s, t) for x : s, y : t; also names the Pair sort former (v0 conflation, noted).
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record. v0 uses one record for both the Pair sort former and the pair term former; a stricter v1 would split them.

nsmBridge.note: order-sensitivity ('first slot' vs 'second slot') has no prime-level rendering; TWO counts a pair's elements but cannot order them.
